name: bd-workflow
author: lambdamechanic
description: How to use bd (beads) for issue tracking, ready work, status updates, and comments in this repo.

name: dumbwaiter-mcp
author: lambdamechanic
description: Provider-agnostic wait-for-change skill that uses the Dumbwaiter MCP server to wait on PR events (GitHub first) via wait.start/status/cancel/await, with progress notifications and durable state.

name: testing-patterns
author: lambdamechanic
description: Testing patterns and standards for this codebase, including async effects, fakes vs mocks, and property-based testing.

name: blog-post
author: langchain-ai
description: Use this skill when writing long-form blog posts, tutorials, or educational articles that require structure, depth, and SEO considerations

name: query-writing
author: langchain-ai
description: For writing and executing SQL queries - from simple single-table queries to complex multi-table JOINs and aggregations

name: schema-exploration
author: langchain-ai
description: For discovering and understanding database structure, tables, columns, and relationships

name: skill-creator
author: langchain-ai
description: Guide for creating effective skills that extend agent capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. Use this skill when the user asks to: (1) create a new skill, (2) make a skill, (3) build a skill, (4) set up a skill, (5) initialize a skill, (6) scaffold a skill, (7) update or modify an existing skill, (8) validate a skill, (9) learn about skill structure, (10) understand how skills work, or (11) get guidance on skill design patterns. Trigger on phrases like "create a skill", "new skill", "make a skill", "skill for X", "how do I create a skill", or "help me build a skill".

name: social-media
author: langchain-ai
description: Use this skill when creating short-form social media content for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, or other platforms

name: backend-dev-guidelines
author: langfuse
description: Comprehensive backend development guide for Langfuse's Next.js 14/tRPC/Express/TypeScript monorepo. Use when creating tRPC routers, public API endpoints, BullMQ queue processors, services, or working with tRPC procedures, Next.js API routes, Prisma database access, ClickHouse analytics queries, Redis queues, OpenTelemetry instrumentation, Zod v4 validation, env.mjs configuration, tenant isolation patterns, or async patterns. Covers layered architecture (tRPC procedures → services, queue processors → services), dual database system (PostgreSQL + ClickHouse), projectId filtering for multi-tenant isolation, traceException error handling, observability patterns, and testing strategies (Jest for web, vitest for worker).
description_zh: 为Langfuse单体仓库后端开发提供详细检查清单和模式。涵盖tRPC路由、公共API、BullMQ队列和环境配置的具体示例。专注于分层架构、多租户隔离和可观测性模式。
_original_description: Provides detailed checklists and patterns for developing features in Langfuse's monorepo. Covers tRPC routers, public APIs, BullMQ queues, and environment configuration with concrete examples. Focuses on layered architecture, multi-tenant isolation, and observability patterns specific to their tech stack.

name: skill-developer
author: langfuse
description: Create and manage Claude Code skills following Anthropic best practices. Use when creating new skills, modifying skill-rules.json, understanding trigger patterns, working with hooks, debugging skill activation, or implementing progressive disclosure. Covers skill structure, YAML frontmatter, trigger types (keywords, intent patterns, file paths, content patterns), enforcement levels (block, suggest, warn), hook mechanisms (UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse), session tracking, and the 500-line rule.
description_zh: 用于创建和管理Claude Code技能的元技能。详细指导技能结构、触发模式、钩子机制和配置。提供模板、示例和故障排除步骤，用于实现基于用户提示或文件内容自动激活的技能。
_original_description: A meta-skill for creating and managing other Claude Code skills. Provides detailed guidance on skill structure, trigger patterns, hook mechanisms, and configuration. Includes templates, examples, and troubleshooting steps for implementing skills that auto-activate based on user prompts or file content.

name: component-refactoring
author: langgenius
description: Refactor high-complexity React components in Dify frontend. Use when `pnpm analyze-component --json` shows complexity > 50 or lineCount > 300, when the user asks for code splitting, hook extraction, or complexity reduction, or when `pnpm analyze-component` warns to refactor before testing; avoid for simple/well-structured components, third-party wrappers, or when the user explicitly wants testing without refactoring.

name: managing-gitlab-mrs
author: lasmarois
description: REQUIRED Go scripts for GitLab Merge Request automation. MUST be loaded before creating merge requests, listing project MRs, or updating MR metadata (title, description, labels, state). Contains authoritative documentation on MR workflows and GitLab API integration. Invoked by gitlab-mr-specialist agent.

name: tzurot-council-mcp
author: lbds137
description: Multi-perspective AI consultation. Invoke with /tzurot-council-mcp for major refactors (>500 lines), structured debugging after failed attempts, or when a technical decision has multiple viable approaches.
description_zh: 该技能提供了在Tzurot v3开发中使用Council MCP服务器的最佳实践，包括何时咨询外部AI、提示词结构、模型选择以及为复杂任务管理多轮对话。
_original_description: Best practices for using the Council MCP server in Tzurot v3 development - When to consult external AI, how to structure prompts, model selection, and multi-turn conversations. Use when planning major changes or needing a second opinion.

name: tzurot-db-vector
author: lbds137
description: Database migration procedures. Invoke with /tzurot-db-vector for Prisma migrations, drift fixes, and pgvector operations.
description_zh: 提供Tzurot v3的PostgreSQL和pgvector数据库模式，包括连接管理、向量操作、迁移以及用于内存检索的Railway特定注意事项。
_original_description: Contains MANDATORY PostgreSQL and pgvector patterns for Tzurot v3. MUST be consulted before writing Prisma queries or migrations. Covers connection management, vector operations, and Railway-specific considerations.

name: tzurot-deployment
author: lbds137
description: Railway deployment procedures. Invoke with /tzurot-deployment for deploying, checking logs, and troubleshooting.
description_zh: 用于管理 Tzurot v3 在 Railway 上部署的技能，包括服务操作、日志分析、环境变量管理、健康检查和解决生产环境问题。
_original_description: Contains MANDATORY Railway deployment procedures for Tzurot v3. MUST be consulted before deploying, running migrations, or debugging production. Covers service management, log analysis, and health checks.

name: tzurot-docs
author: lbds137
description: Session workflow procedures. Invoke with /tzurot-docs for session start/end, CURRENT.md/BACKLOG.md management.
description_zh: 用于维护项目文档的技能，包括更新工作状态文件、组织文档结构，以及遵循提案和参考材料的生命周期管理。
_original_description: Contains MANDATORY documentation procedures. MUST be consulted at session end or when updating CURRENT_WORK.md. Covers folder structure and knowledge continuity.

name: tzurot-git-workflow
author: lbds137
description: Git workflow procedures. Invoke with /tzurot-git-workflow for commit, PR, and release procedures.
description_zh: 专为Tzurot v3项目设计的Git工作流程技能，强制执行严格的仅变基策略、针对develop分支创建PR、提交信息格式化和所有git操作的安全协议。
_original_description: Contains MANDATORY git workflow rules for Tzurot v3. MUST be consulted before any git operation (commit, PR, rebase). Covers rebase-only strategy, commit format, and safety checks.

name: tzurot-testing
author: lbds137
description: Testing procedures. Invoke with /tzurot-testing for test execution, coverage audits, and debugging test failures.
description_zh: 一个用于使用Vitest模式编写和调试测试的技能，包括模拟依赖项、处理假计时器以及在TypeScript环境中管理Promise拒绝。
_original_description: Contains MANDATORY Vitest testing patterns for Tzurot v3. MUST be consulted before creating any `.test.ts` file. Covers mock factories, fake timers, and promise rejection handling.

name: advanced-clean-hexagonal-architecture
author: leaderiop
description: Apply Clean Architecture and Hexagonal (Ports & Adapters) patterns for domain isolation and testability. Use when designing system boundaries, creating ports/adapters, or structuring domain-driven applications.
description_zh: 该技能提供实施整洁架构与六边形架构的指导，通过端口、适配器和分层结构实现领域隔离、可测试性和可维护的系统设计。

name: advanced-deterministic-runtime-container
author: leaderiop
description: Build deterministic IoC containers with proper lifecycle management, scoping, and disposal patterns. Use when implementing DI containers, managing service lifetimes, or designing runtime systems.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建确定性控制反转容器的指导，包括生命周期管理、作用域和处置模式，用于依赖注入实现。

name: advanced-effect-di-environment
author: leaderiop
description: Model dependencies using Effect-style Context, Layer, and Service patterns with compile-time safety. Use when designing DI systems, modeling environments, or building Effect-TS applications.
description_zh: 提供使用Effect-TS模式实现类型安全依赖注入的指导，包括Context、Layer和Service模式，具有编译时验证，用于构建健壮的应用程序。

name: advanced-modular-library-design
author: leaderiop
description: Design modular libraries with clear package boundaries, feature-first organization, and clean API surfaces. Use when structuring monorepos, defining module boundaries, or designing library APIs.
description_zh: 该技能指导如何设计具有清晰包边界、以功能优先组织和简洁API表面的模块化软件库。适用于构建单体仓库、定义模块边界和创建可维护的库架构。

name: advanced-react-clean-integration
author: leaderiop
description: Integrate React with clean architecture without framework leakage using hooks as adapters and presenters. Use when connecting React to domain logic, designing hook-based DI, or isolating UI from business rules.
description_zh: 该技能提供将React与整洁架构集成的指南，使用钩子作为适配器隔离领域逻辑与UI组件，防止应用程序中的框架泄漏。

name: advanced-testability-ai-ergonomic
author: leaderiop
description: Design code for testability and AI/LLM ergonomics with explicit contracts and observable patterns. Use when optimizing code for AI tools, improving testability, or making codebases LLM-friendly.
description_zh: 该Claude技能提供编写代码的指导原则，旨在使代码易于测试并优化AI/LLM交互，侧重于明确契约、清晰模式和测试驱动开发，以提高可维护性和AI辅助开发效率。

name: advanced-typescript-type-level
author: leaderiop
description: Master TypeScript type-level programming with conditional types, mapped types, template literals, and infer patterns. Use when writing advanced types, creating utility types, or solving complex type challenges.
description_zh: 此技能提供高级TypeScript类型级编程的专家指导，包括条件类型、映射类型、模板字面量和推断模式，用于创建健壮的实用类型和解决复杂类型挑战。

name: ci-github-actions
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling ci github actions. Use this skill when working on files where ci github actions comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供处理基于GitHub Actions的CI/CD工作流的特定指导，包括代码检查、测试、构建和发布HexDI项目的流程。

name: documentation-docusaurus
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling documentation docusaurus. Use this skill when working on files where documentation docusaurus comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供了使用Docusaurus创建和维护文档的具体指南，包括站点结构、内容风格、API文档和维护标准。

name: global-api-design
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling global API design. Use this skill when working on files where global API design comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供设计全局API的具体指导，包括构建器模式、流畅接口、错误处理和类型推断，以确保一致性和开发者体验。

name: packages-devtools
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages devtools. Use this skill when working on files where packages devtools comes into play.
description_zh: 此技能为Claude提供处理包开发工具的具体指导，专注于依赖注入系统的可视化、调试和文档生成，遵循既定标准。

name: packages-graph
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages graph. Use this skill when working on files where packages graph comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供处理代码中包依赖图的特定指导，专注于编译时架构验证和适配器组合的编码标准遵循。

name: packages-ports
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages ports. Use this skill when working on files where packages ports comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能指导Claude遵循编码标准，用于创建和管理架构端口令牌，这些令牌定义类型化接口和依赖关系，且无运行时影响。

name: packages-react
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages react. Use this skill when working on files where packages react comes into play.
description_zh: 此Claude技能提供处理React包的具体指导，确保遵循将React作为依赖注入适配层的编码标准，包括类型安全的钩子和正确的提供者模式。

name: packages-runtime
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages runtime. Use this skill when working on files where packages runtime comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供处理依赖注入运行时操作的具体指导，遵循编码标准，专注于容器创建、实例生命周期管理和确定性服务解析。

name: packages-testing
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling packages testing. Use this skill when working on files where packages testing comes into play.
description_zh: 此Claude技能为包测试提供指导，使用显式组合和图操作，专注于构建测试专用图和安全覆盖端口，避免全局模拟。

name: testing-type-testing
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling testing type testing. Use this skill when working on files where testing type testing comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供在TypeScript项目中实施类型级别测试的具体指导，专注于使用Vitest和tsd等工具验证类型推断、条件类型和类型错误。

name: testing-vitest
author: leaderiop
description: Your approach to handling testing vitest. Use this skill when working on files where testing vitest comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能为Claude提供实施和维护Vitest测试标准的具体指导，包括TypeScript项目的配置、测试组织、模拟策略和覆盖率要求。

name: agent-mail
author: leegonzales
description: Coordinate with other AI agents via project-local Maildir messaging. Use when operating in tandem mode with Claude, Gemini, or other agents. Enables claiming tasks, reporting completion, handling blocks, and synchronizing work across terminals.
description_zh: 一个基于项目的本地消息系统，用于通过类似邮件的语义协调多个AI代理，支持任务认领、完成报告、阻塞通知和跨终端同步工作。

name: claimify
author: leegonzales
description: Extract and structure claims from discourse into analyzable argument maps with logical relationships and assumptions. Use when analyzing arguments, red-teaming reasoning, synthesizing debates, or transforming conversations into structured claim networks. Triggers include "what are the claims," "analyze this argument," "map the logic," or "find contradictions."
description_zh: 从话语中提取并结构化主张，构建可分析的论点地图，识别逻辑关系和假设，以揭示论证结构、矛盾和漏洞。

name: claude-project-docs
author: leegonzales
description: Generate concise CLAUDE.md files and agent documentation following best practices. Use when setting up a new project for Claude Code, auditing existing CLAUDE.md, or creating progressive disclosure documentation structure.
description_zh: 生成和审核简洁的CLAUDE.md文件（约60行），通过agent_docs/实现渐进式文档结构，优化Claude Code项目设置。

name: claude-speak
author: leegonzales
description: Speak text aloud using high-quality AI voice synthesis (Kokoro TTS on Apple Silicon). Use when user asks to vocalize, narrate, or speak text out loud. Supports concurrent audio generation for multiple callers.
description_zh: 一个文本转语音技能，使用高质量AI语音合成（Kokoro TTS）将文本转换为语音。提供英式和美式语音选项，可调节语速，适用于旁白和音频反馈。
_original_description: Speak text aloud using high-quality AI voice synthesis (Kokoro TTS on Apple Silicon). Use when user asks to vocalize, narrate, or speak text out loud.

name: codebase-navigator
author: leegonzales
description: Semantic code search using osgrep for understanding codebases, finding implementations, and navigating large projects. Use when asked "where is", "how does", "find the code that", or any question about code location or implementation.
description_zh: 一个使用 osgrep 的语义代码搜索工具，帮助开发者通过含义（而非仅关键词）在大型代码库中导航、理解和查找实现。

name: concept-forge
author: leegonzales
description: Transform nebulous ideas into sharp, testable frameworks through multi-perspective dialectical interrogation. Use when developing vague intuitions, pressure-testing concepts, structuring half-formed frameworks, or distinguishing new ideas from existing concepts. Triggers include "explore this idea," "think through X," or "challenge my thinking."
description_zh: 一个通过多视角辩证审问，将模糊想法转化为可测试框架的系统性过程。它挑战假设，揭示结构，并使用原型提问来结晶可操作的见解。

name: context-continuity
author: leegonzales
description: High-fidelity context transfer protocol for moving conversations between AI agents. Preserves decision tempo, open loops, and critical context with graceful degradation. Use when the user says "transfer," "handoff," "continue this in another chat," or needs to work around context window limits. Produces structured artifacts (Minimal ~200 words, Full ~1000 words). DO NOT trigger on simple "summarize our conversation" requests—only when transfer intent is explicit.
description_zh: 创建结构化工件，用于在AI代理之间转移对话，同时保留上下文、决策历史和进展势头。适用于用户需要在新的会话中继续讨论或突破上下文限制的场景。

name: context-continuity-code
author: leegonzales
description: Claude Code-optimized context transfer for development workflows. Preserves code context, git state, running services, and development environment when moving work between sessions. Works seamlessly with peer review skills (Codex/Gemini). Use when transferring development work to a new Claude Code session.
description_zh: 一个Claude技能，用于在编码会话间转移开发上下文，保留代码状态、Git信息、环境细节和工作进度，实现无缝工作流连续性。

name: csv-data-summarizer
author: leegonzales
description: Analyzes CSV files and generates comprehensive summary statistics and visualizations using Python and pandas - automatically and immediately without asking what the user wants.
description_zh: 自动分析上传的CSV文件，使用Python和pandas生成全面的统计摘要和相关可视化，无需用户输入或指导。

name: dad-joke-validator
author: leegonzales
description: Analyze and score jokes on the dad joke quality spectrum with multi-dimensional feedback on pun quality, groan factor, wholesomeness, and structure. Can also generate dad jokes.
description_zh: 分析笑话的“老爸笑话”质量，从双关语质量、尴尬程度、健康性和结构多个维度进行评分并提供反馈。也可以生成符合标准的新老爸笑话。

name: excel-auditor
author: leegonzales
description: Analyze unknown or inherited Excel files to understand what they do, document their purpose, audit formulas for errors, and assess maintainability risk. Use when: (1) User uploads an Excel file asking 'what does this do?', (2) User needs to understand an inherited/legacy spreadsheet, (3) User wants formula auditing or error detection, (4) User asks about spreadsheet risk, complexity, or documentation, (5) User mentions 'inherited', 'legacy', 'undocumented', or 'someone left' regarding Excel files.
description_zh: 分析Excel文件以理解其用途、审计公式错误、检测风险，并为继承或未记录的电子表格生成文档。

name: inevitability-engine
author: leegonzales
description: Systematic research protocol for discovering novel AI-native software businesses in the synthetic workforce era. Maps capability trajectories, analyzes segment-problem spaces, generates business models, and calculates inevitability scores across 3-24 month time horizons. Use when exploring AI business opportunities, conducting market research, or identifying automation-native ventures.
description_zh: 一个用于发现和验证AI原生商业机会的系统研究协议。它分析能力趋势，发现自动化痛点，生成商业模式，并评估其在不同时间范围内的必然性。

name: nano-banana
author: leegonzales
description: Generate and edit high-quality AI images using Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image model (Nano Banana Pro) via MCP. Use when user wants to create images, edit photos, generate graphics, or needs visual content with text rendering.
description_zh: 该Claude技能通过MCP使用谷歌Gemini 3 Pro模型生成和编辑高质量AI图像。它能创建4K图像、编辑照片、渲染文字，并在多张图片中保持角色一致性。

name: notebooklm
author: leegonzales
description: Query Google NotebookLM for source-grounded, citation-backed answers from uploaded documents. Reduces hallucinations through Gemini's document-only responses. Browser automation with library management and persistent authentication.
description_zh: 一个用于查询Google NotebookLM的工具，可从上传的文档中获取基于来源、带有引用的答案。它通过浏览器自动化进行库管理和身份验证，以减少AI幻觉。

name: pr-review-loop
author: leegonzales
description: Manage PR review feedback loops with Gemini Code Assist. Use when pushing changes to a PR, iterating on review feedback, or monitoring CI/review status. Automatically falls back to Claude when Gemini is rate-limited.
description_zh: 一个使用Gemini Code Assist（Claude作为备用）自动化管理PR代码审查反馈循环的技能。它简化了处理审查意见、提交更改和触发新审查的流程，同时强制执行安全的Git操作规范。

name: process-mapper
author: leegonzales
description: Map workflows, extract SOPs, and identify automation opportunities through systematic process capture and AI tractability assessment. Use when documenting workflows, creating SOPs, conducting process discovery interviews, or analyzing automation opportunities. Grounds the SOP-first doctrine in tacit knowledge documentation and structured analysis.
description_zh: 一个用于发现、记录和分析业务流程的系统化工作流，旨在提取标准作业程序并识别自动化机会，其核心是捕获隐性知识并进行结构化分析。

name: prose-polish
author: leegonzales
description: Evaluate and elevate writing effectiveness through multi-dimensional quality assessment. Analyzes craft, coherence, authority, purpose, and voice with genre-calibrated thresholds. Use for refining drafts, diagnosing quality issues, generating quality content, or teaching writing principles.
description_zh: 一个写作分析和提升工具，从六个质量维度（技巧、连贯性、权威性、目的性、文风、有效性）评估文本，并提供可操作的改进策略。

name: research-to-essay
author: leegonzales
description: Research-driven essay and post creation with thematic synthesis, citation management, and voice calibration. Use when creating Substack/LinkedIn posts, long-form essays synthesizing multiple sources, or publication-grade writing requiring web search, narrative arc, and proper attribution. Triggers include "research and write about [topic]" or "dig into this idea and write."
description_zh: 一个从研究到成文的系统性工作流，用于创建出版物级别的文章。它处理多源信息整合、叙事构建、语气校准和引用管理，适用于Substack、领英和学术写作等格式。

name: silicon-doppelganger
author: leegonzales
description: Build psychometrically accurate personal proxy agents for the PAIRL Conductor system. Extracts personality, decision heuristics, and values into portable schemas that enable AI agents to negotiate, filter, and act on a principal's behalf.
description_zh: 通过提取人格、价值观和决策模式，构建心理测量学上准确的AI代理（数字孪生），将其编码为结构化模式，用于代表委托人进行自动化谈判和任务管理。

name: text-statistics
author: leegonzales
description: Analyze text for word count, reading time, complexity metrics, and readability scores. Use when user asks to analyze document length, calculate reading time, or assess text complexity.
description_zh: 分析文本以提供字数、阅读时间、复杂度指标和可读性分数（如Flesch阅读易度）。用于评估文档长度、阅读难度和受众适宜性。

name: veo3-prompter
author: leegonzales
description: Craft professional video prompts for Google Veo 3.1 using cinematic techniques, audio direction, and timestamp choreography. Use when generating AI videos, creating video prompts, or working with Veo 3.
description_zh: 一个专门用于为Google Veo 3.1制作专业视频提示的技能，利用结构化电影技术、音频指导和多镜头编排来生成高质量AI视频。

name: writing-partner
author: leegonzales
description: Collaborative essay writing that preserves authenticity through structured interview, thread tracking, and voice calibration. Transforms AI from text generator into intellectual prosthesis. Use when writing essays, blog posts, or any content where voice matters more than speed.
description_zh: 一种协作式写作技能，通过结构化访谈、线索追踪和语气校准来保持用户的真实声音。它将AI转变为写作伙伴，适用于散文和任何重视个人风格的内容创作。

name: feishu-docx
author: leemysw
description: Export Feishu/Lark cloud documents to Markdown. Supports docx, sheets, bitable, wiki, and batch wiki space export. Use this skill when you need to read, analyze, write, or reference content from Feishu knowledge base.
_original_description: Export Feishu/Lark cloud documents to Markdown. Supports docx, sheets, bitable, and wiki. Use this skill when you need to read, analyze, or reference content from Feishu knowledge base.

name: concept-workflow
author: leonardomso
description: End-to-end workflow for creating complete JavaScript concept documentation, orchestrating all skills from research to final review
description_zh: 编排五个专用技能，自动化创建JavaScript概念文档，按顺序处理研究、编写、测试、事实核查和SEO审查。为每个步骤提供明确的阶段依赖关系、时间估算和质量关卡。

name: fact-check
author: leonardomso
description: Verify technical accuracy of JavaScript concept pages by checking code examples, MDN/ECMAScript compliance, and external resources to prevent misinformation
description_zh: 该技能提供验证JavaScript文档准确性的结构化方法。它检查代码示例的实际输出、验证MDN链接、审核技术声明并运行项目测试。详细的五阶段流程有助于保持教育内容的技术正确性。

name: resource-curator
author: leonardomso
description: Find, evaluate, and maintain high-quality external resources for JavaScript concept documentation, including auditing for broken and outdated links
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套系统化方法，用于审计和筛选JavaScript文档的外部学习资源。包含链接失效检查、内容过时检测和质量标准清单，并为不同资源类型（文章、视频、MDN参考）设定了具体目标。
_original_description: This skill provides a systematic method for auditing and curating external learning resources for JavaScript documentation. It includes checklists for broken links, outdated content, and quality standards, with specific targets for different resource types (articles, videos, MDN references).

name: seo-review
author: leonardomso
description: Perform a focused SEO audit on JavaScript concept pages to maximize search visibility, featured snippet optimization, and ranking potential
description_zh: 为JavaScript概念文档页面提供结构化的SEO审计方法。包含关键词集群模板、分步审计清单和详细报告格式。专为33个JavaScript概念项目设计，但可适配类似技术文档。

name: test-writer
author: leonardomso
description: Generate comprehensive Vitest tests for code examples in JavaScript concept documentation pages, following project conventions and referencing source lines
description_zh: 该技能为JavaScript概念文档生成Vitest测试，通过提取代码示例并将其转换为结构化的测试文件。它处理不同类型的示例（可测试、DOM、错误），并提供具体的测试模式，包含源代码行引用以便追溯。该技能强制执行项目约定，并提供实现全面测试覆盖的方法。

name: write-concept
author: leonardomso
description: Write or review JavaScript concept documentation pages for the 33 JavaScript Concepts project, following strict structure and quality guidelines
description_zh: 该技能为33个JavaScript概念项目提供详细的文档编写指南。它强制执行一致的结构、初学者友好的语气和SEO优化，同时主动避免AI生成的语言模式。工具包含内容质量、测试和技术SEO要求的全面检查清单。

name: delegation-autopilot
author: leonardsellem
description: In Codex interactive mode, call delegate_autopilot automatically for multi-step or cross-cutting requests (including research-only), otherwise work normally.

name: cron
author: letta-ai
description: Create and manage scheduled tasks (cron jobs) that send you messages at specified times.

name: food-order
author: letta-ai
description: Reorder Foodora orders + track ETA/status with ordercli. Never confirm without explicit user approval. Triggers: order food, reorder, track ETA.

name: google
author: letta-ai
description: Google Workspace CLI (gog) for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

name: imsg
author: letta-ai
description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, history, watch, and sending.

name: morph-warpgrep
author: letta-ai
description: Integration guide for Morph's WarpGrep (fast agentic code search) and Fast Apply (10,500 tok/s code editing). Use when building coding agents that need fast, accurate code search or need to apply AI-generated edits to code efficiently. Particularly useful for large codebases, deep logic queries, bug tracing, and code path analysis.

name: openhue
author: letta-ai
description: Control Philips Hue lights/scenes via the OpenHue CLI.

name: scheduling
author: letta-ai
description: Create scheduled tasks and one-off reminders. Use for recurring jobs (daily, weekly) or future reminders (in 5 minutes, tomorrow at 3pm).

name: things-mac
author: letta-ai
description: Manage Things 3 via the `things` CLI on macOS (add/update projects+todos via URL scheme; read/search/list from the local Things database). Use when a user asks Clawdbot to add a task to Things, list inbox/today/upcoming, search tasks, or inspect projects/areas/tags.

name: enferno-dev
author: level09
description: Development skill for Enferno Flask framework. Use when implementing features, fixing bugs, or writing code for Enferno-based applications. This includes creating models, API endpoints, Vue.js frontend components, database operations, or any development task within the Enferno ecosystem. Triggers: creating blueprints, adding models, building APIs, Vue/Vuetify components, Celery tasks, database migrations.

name: ai-evals
author: liqiongyu
description: Create an AI Evals Pack (eval PRD, test set, rubric, judge plan, results + iteration loop). Use for LLM evaluation, benchmarks, rubrics, error analysis/open coding, and ship/no-ship quality gates for AI features.

name: ai-product-strategy
author: liqiongyu
description: Create an AI Product Strategy Pack (thesis, prioritized use cases, system plan, eval + learning plan, agentic safety plan, roadmap). Use for AI product strategy, LLM/agent strategy, AI roadmap, AI-first product direction.

name: analyzing-user-feedback
author: liqiongyu
description: Analyze user/customer feedback and produce a User Feedback Analysis Pack (source inventory, normalized feedback table, taxonomy/codebook, themes + evidence, recommendations, and feedback loop). Use for voice of customer, feature request analysis, support ticket synthesis, churn reason synthesis, and survey open-ends.

name: behavioral-product-design
author: liqiongyu
description: Apply behavioral science to product design and produce a Behavioral Product Design Pack (target behavior, behavioral diagnosis, intervention map, prioritized concepts, design specs, experiment + instrumentation plan, ethics/trust review). Use for retention, onboarding, habit loops, and behavior change problems.

name: brand-storytelling
author: liqiongyu
description: Create a Brand Storytelling Pack (brand narrative, founder/origin story, five-second moment, channel scripts, building-in-public plan, Q&A bank). Use for brand story, founder story, origin story, narrative, pitch story, storytelling, and brand narrative. Category: Marketing.

name: building-a-promotion-case
author: liqiongyu
description: Build a promotion case and produce a Promotion Case Pack (target role + timeline, ladder mapping, evidence log, impact narrative, manager alignment plan, sponsor/visibility map, submission-ready promo doc). Use for promotion packet, getting promoted, leveling up, career ladder, promotion committee. Category: Career.

name: building-sales-team
author: liqiongyu
description: Build an early sales team and operating cadence (readiness gate, hiring plan, role scorecards, interview loop, onboarding/ramp). Use for first AE/SDR hires, seed→Series A sales team build, and product-led sales pilot. Category: Sales & GTM.

name: building-team-culture
author: liqiongyu
description: Build or refresh a team culture and produce a Team Culture Operating System Pack (culture snapshot, culture code, norms, rituals, rollout + measurement plan). Use for team culture, culture code, team values, team norms, psychological safety, and coaching culture. Category: Hiring & Teams.

name: building-with-llms
author: liqiongyu
description: Produce an LLM Build Pack (prompt+tool contract, data/eval plan, architecture+safety, launch checklist). Use for building with LLMs, GPT/Claude apps, prompt engineering, RAG, and tool-using agents.

name: career-transitions
author: liqiongyu
description: Plan and execute a career transition and produce a Career Transition Pack (progress metric + push/pull map, target archetypes, option scorecard, opportunity pipeline + outreach scripts, skills plan, 4–12 week experiment plan). Use for career change, career pivot, career transition, switching roles. Category: Career.

name: coaching-pms
author: liqiongyu
description: Coach product managers and produce a PM Coaching Pack (context-specific definition of “good PM”, evidence-based assessment, growth bets + development plan, coaching cadence + session toolkit, follow-up tracker). Use for coaching PMs, developing PMs, leveling expectations, and creating growth plans. Category: Leadership.

name: community-building
author: liqiongyu
description: Build a Community Building Pack (strategy, platform plan, programming calendar, ambassador program, governance, metrics, launch plan). Use for community building, community-led growth, developer community, user community, ambassador/champions programs, Discord/Slack/forum communities. Category: Marketing.

name: competitive-analysis
author: liqiongyu
description: Produce a Competitive Analysis Pack (competitive alternatives map, competitor landscape, differentiation & positioning hypotheses, battlecards, monitoring plan). Use for competitor research, competitive landscape, win/loss analysis, and positioning vs alternatives.

name: conducting-interviews
author: liqiongyu
description: Run structured, behavioral hiring interviews and produce an Interview Execution Pack (plan, questions, scorecard, debrief). Use for interview process, interview questions, interview loop, screening, behavioral interview, structured interview. Category: Hiring & Teams.

name: conducting-user-interviews
author: liqiongyu
description: Plan, conduct, and synthesize high-signal user interviews and produce a User Interview Pack (recruiting plan, screener, discussion guide, notes template, synthesis report). Use for user interview, customer interview, discovery interview, JTBD switch interview, concept interview.

name: content-marketing
author: liqiongyu
description: Build a content marketing program by producing a Content Marketing Plan Pack (content market fit brief, demand-validated SEO topic map, human voice + primary channel strategy, editorial calendar, content briefs, AI-assisted writing SOP, measurement plan). Use for content marketing, content strategy, blog, SEO, thought leadership, founder-led content.

name: cross-functional-collaboration
author: liqiongyu
description: Lead cross-functional collaboration by producing a Cross-Functional Collaboration Pack (mission charter, stakeholder/incentives map, roles & expectations contract, operating cadence, decision log, conflict + credit norms). Use for cross-functional collaboration, working with engineering, working with design, reducing execution friction.

name: defining-product-vision
author: liqiongyu
description: Define or refresh a product vision and produce a shareable Product Vision Pack (vision statement, narrative, pillars, strategic choices, rollout). Use for product vision, vision statement, product direction, long-term product strategy.

name: delegating-work
author: liqiongyu
description: Create a Delegation Pack (delegation brief, decision rights, context handoff, check-in cadence, review plan, debrief). Use for delegation, letting go, empowering reports, and avoiding micromanagement.

name: design-engineering
author: liqiongyu
description: Stand up a Design Engineering practice (hybrid design+engineering) by producing a Design Engineering Execution Pack: charter, prototype→production workflow, design-to-code contract, component delivery plan, and quality bar. Use for design engineering, UI engineering, design systems engineering, and prototype-to-production processes.

name: design-systems
author: liqiongyu
description: Build or evolve a design system by producing a Design System Operating Pack: charter, token model (incl. depth/elevation), component inventory + roadmap, blockframe-to-component mapping, documentation plan, and governance/adoption plan. Use for design systems, component libraries, design tokens, UI kits, and pattern libraries.

name: designing-growth-loops
author: liqiongyu
description: Design growth loops (viral/referral/acquisition loops, flywheels) and produce a Growth Loop Design Pack (loop map, loop scorecard, channel fit + paid-loop feasibility, experiment backlog, measurement plan). Use for growth teams creating new growth loops or innovating beyond incremental optimization.

name: designing-surveys
author: liqiongyu
description: Design and launch a product survey and produce a Survey Pack (brief, questionnaire/instrument, analysis plan, launch checklist, reporting outline). Use for customer surveys, onboarding surveys, NPS/CSAT/PMF, cancellation/churn, and feedback surveys.

name: dogfooding
author: liqiongyu
description: Run an internal dogfooding program/sprint and produce a Dogfooding Pack (charter, scenario map, routines, dogfooding log + triage board spec, weekly report, ship/no-ship gate). Use for “dogfooding”, “eat our own dog food”, internal beta, and product teams using the product daily to find friction before shipping.

name: energy-management
author: liqiongyu
description: Build an Energy Management Operating System Pack (energy drivers/drains map, calendar energy audit, zone-of-genius expansion plan, energy-aligned weekly schedule, recovery routines, and 2-week experiments). Use for sustainable leadership performance and burnout prevention. Category: Leadership.
